children.text: Each Android device is unique. This means each Android device may have it's unique latency when interacting with a screen.
In order to ensure the best possible experience on your device we recommend that you complete the metronome latency calibration. It is easy and will not take more than a minute.
Now, tap on the button below in sync with the metronome. Keep tapping the rhythm as precise as possible for several seconds. Perfect Ear will estimate the latency and show you the result.
